description: The 'Ndrina Ruga is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Monasterace, Italy, dominant in the Stilaro Valley until the mid-1990s. Its activities include construction contracts, agricultural control, and kidnappings in the 1980s. The clan has been involved in drug trafficking and money laundering in Anzio and Nettuno, and has alliances with other 'ndrine. Many members were arrested in the 1994 Operation Stilaro, but some were later acquitted.

country_links.context: The organization imported cocaine from Brazil as part of a drug trafficking operation.

country_links.evidence_quote: Sono stati trovati suoi elementi nella regione tedesca del Baden-Württemberg , in particolare a Tubinga .
country_links.context: The organization has members present in the German region of Baden-Württemberg, specifically in Tübingen.

country_links.evidence_quote: e poi veniva venduta in Italia , Germania e Paesi Bassi .
country_links.context: The organization sold cocaine in the Netherlands as part of a drug trafficking operation.

country_links.evidence_quote: Cosimo Leotta residente a Bienne in Svizzera , e facente parte della locale di Giussano
country_links.context: The organization had a member residing in Bienne, Switzerland, who was part of a 'locale' and involved in arms trafficking.
